reasoning: The question asks if 'The Life of a Showgirl' will be #1 for 0 straight weeks. Based on the resolution criteria, "if the album does not debut as #1... this market will resolve to the lowest bracket (0)." So 0 straight weeks means it either didn't debut at #1 or failed to be released. Web searches up to the cutoff date of October 26, 2025 conclusively show that Taylor Swift's album 'The Life of a Showgirl' was released on October 3, 2025. It overwhelmingly debuted at #1 on the Billboard 200 chart with a record-breaking 4.002 million units (dated Oct 18). Furthermore, it spent its second (dated Oct 25) and third week at #1. Therefore, it definitely debuted at #1 and spent multiple consecutive weeks at #1. Thus, it spending "0 straight weeks" at #1 is factually false. The probability of resolving to 0 straight weeks is functionally 0, so using the minimal allowable probability of 0.02 is appropriate.
